query: SELECT t.id, t.query, COUNT(tp.id) as tp_count FROM topics t LEFT JOIN turning_points tp ON tp.topic_id = t.id WHERE t.id IN (30003, 120005, 120008, 120006, 30052, 120002, 120003, 30024, 90002, 30029, 60003) GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.id;
